  as={"h1"}

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/public/{organisation}/checkout/start"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Handle POST requests for public/\{organisation\}/checkout/start

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"organisation","in":"path","description":"Organisation slug","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"organisation"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Description of the request body","required":false,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["checkout"],"properties":{"checkout":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["line_items","stripe_account_id","success_url","cancel_url"],"properties":{"email":{"type":"string","description":"The email of the customer to send the receipt to. Only applicable if collect_customer_on_stripe is false"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the customer to send the receipt to. Only applicable if collect_customer_on_stripe is false"},"collect_customer_on_stripe":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether to collect customer information on stripe during checkout","default":false},"coupon_code":{"type":"string","description":"The coupon code to apply to the checkout"},"success_url":{"type":"string","description":"The url to redirect to after a successful checkout"},"cancel_url":{"type":"string","description":"The url to redirect to after a cancelled checkout"},"application_fee_amount":{"type":"integer","description":"The amount to charge as an application fee in cents"},"stripe_account_id":{"type":"string","description":"The stripe account id to use for this checkout"},"line_items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["ksuid","entity_type","name","price_id","event_ksuid"],"properties":{"ksuid":{"type":"string","description":"The ksuid of the item/bundle associated with this line item"},"entity_type":{"type":"string","description":"The type of the line item, either 'item' or 'bundle'"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the product associated with this line item"},"includes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"The list of items included in this line item if it's a bundle"},"event_ksuid":{"type":"string","description":"The ksuid of the event associated with this item"},"price_id":{"type":"string","description":"The price id of the product in stripe"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","description":"The quantity of this item to add to the checkout","default":1}},"x-internal-group":"checkout","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"LineItemObjectPublic"}}},"x-internal-group":"checkout","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"CheckoutObjectPublic"}}},"x-internal-group":"checkout","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"CreateCheckoutRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success","headers":{}},"405":{"description":"Method Not Allowed","headers":{}},"500":{"description":"Internal Server Error","headers":{}}}}
>
